mission.title: atlantis: fix(output): Remove Refreshing state... from output
mission.description:
Fixes #1306

Since Terraform 0.14.0 there are no separator between refreshing plan and the plan. This strategy is to find the last line with "Refreshing state..." and remove it with all of the above.

I remove the sentence "Refreshing Terraform state in-memory prior to plan..." from tests because Terraform don't show that anymore.

resolution.summary:
This reverts commit 7301febcb4409e05fe78d8b18dfb220413a8191f.

Fixtures weren't updated here:
https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/pull/1352
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
